reasoning_model_1:

model_comparison: In comparing the two models, Model 2 is superior due to Content Accuracy. While both models effectively convey the requested 'rude' Attitude through their paralinguistic delivery, Model 1 failed to adhere strictly to the script by omitting the word 'of' ('Get out the way' vs 'Get out of the way').
